name: Cen Tex Manufacturing
description_short: Cen-Tex Manufacturing Credit Union is a member-owned, NCUA-insured credit union serving 3M employees and their families since 1979, offering checking, savings, loans, and financial services.
description_long:
Cen-Tex Manufacturing Credit Union was chartered on November 15, 1979, by 3M plant management and staff members seeking to better serve the 3M community in Brownwood, Texas. The credit union operates as a separate entity from 3M, though it maintains offices on 3M premises. It has grown from a handful of members served by a single part-time employee to over 1,200 members today. The organization is federally chartered and insured by the National Credit Union Association (NCUA), with member savings protected up to $250,000.

Cen-Tex offers comprehensive financial services including share savings accounts, share certificates, personal loans, vehicle loans, cashier's checks, money orders, wire transfers, notary services, and extended vehicle warranty policies. The credit union has expanded its digital presence with online member access and continues to work toward offering additional services. They charge modest fees for most services—money orders at $0.50, cashier's checks at $2.50, and wire transfers at $25—which are competitive within the credit union sector.

The credit union's primary distinction is its exclusive membership base: accounts are available only to 3M employees, retired 3M employees, spouses, children, and parents of eligible members. This narrow field of membership creates a tight-knit community focus and allows the credit union to deeply understand its members' financial needs. The organization is governed by a seven-member board of directors composed of community members and maintains a lean but dedicated staff including a manager, loan officer, and member services representative.

Cen-Tex represents a traditional, community-focused credit union model with over four decades of stability and member loyalty. However, its exclusive membership policy means it cannot serve the general public, and its service offerings appear more limited compared to larger regional credit unions. The organization serves a specific demographic well but lacks the scale and technological sophistication of larger financial institutions.
services: Share savings accounts (with 6 free withdrawals per month)
Share certificate accounts with early withdrawal penalty ($5 for Christmas shares before Nov 1)
Personal loans with 5% late charge policy
Vehicle loans with GAP insurance policies ($345)
pros: NCUA-insured member savings up to $250,000 for security and peace of mind
Exclusive membership limited to 3M employees and families creates personalized, community-focused service
Over 40 years of operational history and stability since 1979 founding
Free notary service for members, eliminating common banking fees
Low-cost basic services: money orders at $0.50, competitive wire transfer fees at $25
On-site location at 3M Brownwood premises for convenient member access
Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP) policies available for vehicle loans
Holiday skip-a-payment options for loan flexibility during seasonal challenges
cons: Membership is strictly limited to 3M employees, retirees, and immediate family—general public cannot join
Limited service menu compared to larger regional credit unions; no mention of online banking, mobile apps, or ATM network
Small staff (three known employees) may result in limited availability and slower service response times
Late loan charges at 5% may be higher than competitor rates
Restricted withdrawal limit of only 6 free withdrawals per month from share savings accounts
best_for: 3M Brownwood employees seeking member-owned financial institution with personalized service
Retirees from 3M wanting to maintain banking relationship within 3M community
Families of 3M employees looking for conservative, stable credit union with 40+ year track record
Members prioritizing on-site convenience at workplace and personal relationship banking
diagnosis: Cen-Tex Manufacturing Credit Union is ideal for current and retired 3M Brownwood employees and their families seeking stable, relationship-based credit union banking with federal insurance protection. The primary caveat is membership exclusivity—this institution cannot serve the general public, and prospective members must have a qualifying 3M affiliation. Additionally, digital banking capabilities appear limited based on available website information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Cen Tex Manufacturing — NCUA-insured credit union in Brownwood, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
